title: Clove Folded Tofu Stew
description: A comforting Venezuelan dish featuring buttery and tender tofu with a hint of clove, ideal for those following a diabetic-friendly diet.
instructions: Drain and press the tofu to remove excess water. Break it into small cubes.
Heat a tablespoon of butter in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Stir in tomato puree and cook for another minute. Dissolve turmeric powder in 1/4 cup of warm water and add to the pot.
Fold in the tofu cubes with the spice mixture. Stir well to coat the tofu evenly.
Pour in the water or vegetable stock, stir again, cover, and let simmer on low heat for about 20 minutes or until the tofu is tender and slightly thickened.
Remove from heat and fold in fresh ground cloves (ensure clove quantity is correct based on dietary considerations). Taste and adjust salt if needed.
